channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HEXT] Hexaware files FY25 Annual Report; 33rd AGM on May 5, 2026
item.description:
Hexaware Technologies Ltd has filed its Annual Report for the financial year ended December 31, 2025. The report includes the Notice for the 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for Tuesday, May 05, 2026, at 4:00 p.m. IST via Video Conferencing or Other Audio Visual Means. The Annual Report and AGM Notice are accessible on the company's website. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for FY2025 is an integral part of the Annual Report. The company will also send web-links to the Annual Report to shareholders who have not registered their email IDs. The report emphasizes the company's strategy of "Artificial Intelligence Led. Human Intelligence Perfected."

  • Hexaware filed its Annual Report for the financial year ended December 31, 2025.
  • The 33rd Annual General Meeting is scheduled for May 05, 2026, via virtual means.
  • The Annual Report includes the Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR).
  • The report highlights the company's focus on AI-led execution with human governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hexaware Technologies Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [HEXT] Hexaware announces 33rd AGM on May 5, 2026; releases 2025 Annual Report
item.description:
Hexaware Technologies Ltd announced its 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on Tuesday, May 05, 2026, at 04:00 p.m. IST via Video Conferencing or Other Audio Visual Means. The company has enclosed its Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2025, which includes the Notice of the 33rd AGM. The Annual Report and AGM Notice are available on the company's website. Additionally, the Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the year ended December 31, 2025, is part of the Annual Report, as per SEBI regulations. The company is also sending web-links to the Annual Report to shareholders without registered email IDs. The report details Hexaware's strategy on "Artificial Intelligence Led. Human Intelligence Perfected." across its workflows.

  • 33rd Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 5, 2026, virtually.
  • Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2025, released.
  • Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) included.
  • Report details Hexaware's AI-led strategy and governance framework.
  • All relevant documents are accessible on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hexaware Technologies Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [HEXT] Hexaware to hold 33rd AGM on May 5, 2026; Annual Report 2025 released
item.description:
Hexaware Technologies Ltd announced its 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on Tuesday, May 05, 2026, at 04.00 p.m. IST via Video Conferencing/OAVM. The company has released its Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2025, which includes the Notice of the 33rd AGM and the Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR). The Annual Report is available on the company's website, and web-links are being sent to shareholders who have not registered their email IDs. The report emphasizes the company's focus on "Artificial Intelligence Led. Human Intelligence Perfected."

  • 33rd Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 05, 2026, to be held virtually.
  • Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2025, including BRSR, has been released.
  • Report details financial statements, corporate governance, and ESG performance.
  • Company highlights its strategic focus on AI-led execution with human governance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hexaware Technologies Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [INERTIAST] Banganga Paper Industries changes name to Asgard Alcobev
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Banganga Paper Industries Limited has received approval from BSE Limited to change its name to Asgard Alcobev Limited. The approval was granted on April 10, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company's Scrip ID and abbreviated name on the BOLT Plus System will be updated to ASGARD, effective from April 17, 2026. This corporate action signifies a significant rebranding and potential shift in the company's business focus from paper to alcoholic beverages, which is relevant for investors.

  • Company name changed from Banganga Paper Industries to Asgard Alcobev Limited.
  • BSE approval for the name change received on April 10, 2026.
  • New Scrip ID and abbreviated name 'ASGARD' effective from April 17, 2026.
  • The change suggests a strategic shift towards the alcoholic beverages sector.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INERTIA STEEL LTD. | Category: Rebranding

item.title: [INDIAGLYCO] IGL Demerger Scheme: NCLT Admits Second Motion Petition
item.description:
🔥 Trending

India Glycols Ltd (IGL) announced that the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, on April 9, 2026, admitted the Second Motion Petition for its Scheme of Arrangement. This scheme involves the demerger of India Glycols Limited into Ennature Biopharma Limited and IGL Spirits Limited. The NCLT has directed the company to publish notices in newspapers and issue notices to specified authorities, allowing them 30 days to submit any representations. The next hearing for further proceedings is scheduled for May 21, 2026. The scheme remains contingent on obtaining all necessary regulatory and other approvals.

  • NCLT admitted Second Motion Petition for IGL's demerger scheme.
  • Scheme involves demerger into Ennature Biopharma and IGL Spirits.
  • NCLT directed newspaper publication and notices to authorities.
  • Authorities have 30 days to submit representations.
  • Next hearing for the scheme is scheduled for May 21, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIA GLYCOLS LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [INNOVISION] Innovision appoints Aditya Jha as Independent Director, reconstitutes committees
item.description:
Innovision Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on April 10, 2026, approved the appointment of Mr. Aditya Jha as an Additional Director (Non-Executive, Independent). His appointment is effective immediately and will be recommended to shareholders for approval as an Independent Director for a five-year term at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Mr. Jha brings 25 years of diverse experience in corporate, consulting, Fintech, and energy tech sectors. Additionally, the Board re-constituted its Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration Committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee, with Mr. Jha taking on the role of Chairman for the Audit Committee and a member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. These changes aim to enhance corporate governance.

  • Innovision appointed Aditya Jha as Additional Independent Director.
  • Jha's appointment is for five years, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Board re-constituted Audit, Nomination & Remuneration, and Stakeholders Committees.
  • Aditya Jha will chair the Audit Committee, enhancing governance.
  • Jha brings 25 years of diverse experience to the board.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Innovision Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [CAPRICORN] Capricorn Promoters Confirm No Share Encumbrance FY26
item.description:
Promoters of Capricorn Systems Global Solutions Ltd have confirmed that they did not encumber any shares, directly or indirectly, during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This disclosure, made under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, further states that as of March 31, 2026, a nil number of shares held by the promoters in the company are encumbered or pledged. This indicates stability in promoter holdings.

  • Promoters confirmed no share encumbrance in FY26.
  • Zero shares are pledged or encumbered as of March 31, 2026.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI (SAST) Regulation 31(4).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAPRICORN SYSTEMS GLOBAL SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [PCJEWELLER] PC Jeweller reduces bank debt by 14%, repays majority outstanding
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PC Jeweller Ltd announced a further reduction of its outstanding debt to banks by approximately 14%. This move is part of the company's objective to achieve a debt-free status. With this latest reduction, PC Jeweller has now repaid the majority of its outstanding debt owed to banks under the Joint Settlement Agreement, indicating significant progress towards its financial goals. The funds for this debt reduction came from the balance consideration received from the conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants into equity shares by both promoter and public entities. The company aims to become debt-free in the near future.

  • PC Jeweller reduced bank debt by approximately 14%.
  • Company has now repaid majority of outstanding bank debt.
  • Progressing rapidly towards a debt-free status.
  • Debt reduction funded by warrant conversion proceeds.
  • Promoter and public entities converted warrants to equity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PC JEWELLER LTD. | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [INNOVISION] Innovision Appoints Aditya Jha as Additional Independent Director
item.description:
Innovision Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting on April 10, 2026, appointed Mr. Aditya Jha (DIN: 01962674) as an Additional Director (Non-Executive, Independent). His appointment is effective immediately and is for a period of five years, subject to approval by shareholders at the ensuing Annual General Meeting. Mr. Jha is a seasoned business leader with 25 years of diverse experience across various sectors including corporate, consulting, Fintech, and energy tech. Concurrently, the Board also reconstituted its Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration Committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee, effective from April 10, 2026. Mr. Jha will serve as the Chairman of the Audit Committee and a member of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

  • Innovision appointed Aditya Jha as an Additional Independent Director.
  • His appointment is for five years, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Jha will chair the Audit Committee and join the NRC.
  • Board committees were reconstituted effective April 10, 2026.
  • Jha brings 25 years of diverse industry experience.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Innovision Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PENIND] Pennar Industries: Non-Executive Director P V Rao Resigns
item.description:
Pennar Industries Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. P V Rao, a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director, effective April 11, 2026. Mr. Rao tendered his resignation due to unavoidable personal situations, stating no other material reasons. He has a long association with the Pennar Group, having joined in January 2008 and being instrumental in establishing Pennar Engineered Building Systems. He also served as Joint Managing Director of Pennar Industries until early 2021. The company will complete the necessary regulatory filings.

  • Non-Executive Director P V Rao resigned from Pennar Industries' board.
  • Resignation is effective April 11, 2026, citing personal situations.
  • Mr. Rao had a significant 18-year tenure with the Pennar Group.
  • He was instrumental in establishing Pennar Engineered Building Systems.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PENNAR INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change
